message:
Document executor API invariants and lifecycle

Add file-level docblock to async.hpp documenting the operator lifecycle,
key invariants, and the difference between transformation operators
(process → finalize → state) and source operators
(await_task → process_task → state). This consolidates cross-cutting
concerns that apply to multiple methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
